events.title: 2026 Florida Adult Regional Championships
events.location: Winter Park Volleyball Club, 2603 Ace Rd. Orlando, FL 32792
events.description:
EVENT BEGINS IN:

EVENT SPONSOR:

SATURDAY, MAY 16, 2026 | WINTER PARK VOLLEYBALL CLUB:
Sign your team up to prepare for the USAV Open Adult National Championships! This event is the Saturday prior to the start of Nationals and will be a great way to get your team ready for nation-wide competition.

TEAM ENTRY IS FREE!:
Divisions: Men’s Division (A/AA): 12 teams max *Minimum of 4 teams required per division Women’s Division (A/AA): 12 teams max *Minimum of 4 teams required per division
Schedule: 8am-8:45am: Team Check in 9am: Pool Play begins 3pm: Bracket Play begins
​Prize Money: ​1st place: $1,000 ​2nd place: $750
R1 will be provided (teams will provide remaining positions) USAV Rules and Uniform Requirements will be followed.

DEADLINE TO ENTER - MAY 13TH AT 3PM:
Teams are not required to be registered for USAV Open Adult National Championships
If you have any questions about this event, please reach out to [email protected] or give our office a call at (352) 742-0080
15010 US Highway 441 Eustis, Fl 32726
[email protected]
(352) 742-0080

HELPFUL LINKS:
- Membership Information
- Indoor Jr. Bids and Rankings
- ​Sanction a USAV Event
- Find a Club
- Events and Event Schedule
- Become an Official
- Request COI
- Policies & Procedures

OFFICE HOURS:
9 AM to 5 PM, Monday-Friday
Closed on Good Friday, Memorial Day, Independence Day, Labor Day, Thanksgiving Day, Thanksgiving Friday, Christmas Eve through New Years Day

events.title: Co-Ed Volleyball League (season dates TBD)
events.description:
The Co-ed Volleyball League will feature a 7-game regular season and playoffs for qualifying teams. Games are played on Tuesday nights at 6:30 pm, 7:30 pm, and 8:30 pm. Upcoming league season dates to be announced. Games are played at Jim Beech Recreation Center. Players must be at least 18 years old to participate in this league. Volleyball Participation Waiver Required. If interested, don't hesitate to email Alex Gonzalez or call Parks and Leisure Services at 407-905-3180 .

Volleyball Participation Waiver: https://ocoee-recreation-parks-and-rec.app.transform.civicplus.com/forms/35724

Email contact: agonzalez@ocoee.org

Call Parks and Recreation Leisure Services: 407-905-3180

events.title: Open Gym Volleyball
events.description:
Join us every Tuesday night from 8:15 pm to 10:30 pm for open gym volleyball. Our open gym format allows players of all skill levels to enjoy open court time - no teams, no rosters, no pressure . Whether you’re new to the sport, working on technique, or looking for regular volleyball fun with others, our gym is ready for you. All participants must have an active daily or annual membership. Register for open gym volleyball .

Annual court pass available for $35.

Register: https://secure.rec1.com/FL/ocoee-parks-recreation-fl/catalog/index/0679b20b7684e99b55b7c87a01b6acfc?filter=c2VhcmNoPSZjYXRlZ29yeSU1QjMyNDg3JTVEPTE=

Join us every Tuesday night from 8:15 pm to 10:30 pm for open gym volleyball. Our open gym format allows players of all skill levels to enjoy open court time - no teams, no rosters, no pressure . Whether you’re new to the sport, working on technique, or looking for regular volleyball fun with others, our gym is ready for you. All participants must have an active daily or annual membership. events.title: 2027 Florida USAV Gold Series
events.location: Orange County Convention Center, West Hall - A1, 9800 International Dr., Orlando, FL 32819
events.description:
EVENT BEGINS IN:

EVENT SPONSOR:
The top 18 teams in the 13U-17U divisions in the Florida Region will be invited to compete at the Orange County Convention Center. This event will award a National Bid to the winner of the 13U-17U divisions!

REGISTRATION:
This is an invitation-only event. Teams will be accepted on a first come, first served basis, after the following items have been completed:
- Invitation Received - Teams without an invitation will not be accepted
- Completed Team Registration
- Payment Received - Payment by check will not be recorded until check is received by mail
- Housing Verified - THIS EVENT IS A STAY-TO-PLAY EVENT (Housing will be available July 14, 2026 at 12:00pm)
Once a division has reached maximum capacity, there is no guarantee a team will be accepted into the event. Teams will be placed on a wait list and accepted on an as-needed basis. The Florida Region will contact the team if a space becomes available. Tournament staff reserves the right to modify the maximum number of teams per division based on demand and bid impact.

TEAM ENTRY FEES:
2-Day Bid Divisions – $600*
*The payment deadline is December 9th, 2026 at 3PM. Payments made after that date will incur a late fee.

INVITATION SCHEDULE:
- Round 1 - July 13, 2026 (top 18 teams in the 13U-17U divisions)
- Round 2 - July 20, 2026 (if necessary)
- Round 3 - July 27, 2026 (if necessary)
Eligible teams will be sent an invitation to the email address(es) listed in the club’s SportsEngine registration.

REFUND POLICY:
Team Cancellation / Withdrawal Policy:
- By December 9, 2026 at 3:00pm - 100% Refund*
- After December 9, 2026 at 3:00pm - NO Refund
​*Refunds are less processing fees.

ADMISSION INFORMATION:
Athlete and Coach entry will begin at 6:45am.
- Coaches will need to present their assigned QR code and a corresponding photo ID at the entrance.
- Chaperones and parents cannot enter during the early access period.
Access for spectators will begin at 7:15am.

HOUSING:
This is a stay-to-play event. All housing requirements must be met no later than September 1, 2026 at 3:00pm. After September 1, 2026 at 3:00pm, teams that are not compliant will be dropped and wait list teams will be given notice of entry.
The policy language below is being prepared in the form of frequently asked questions with corresponding answers to help clarify the requirements for participating teams.
IMPORTANT NOTE: Team Travel Source is the official event housing partner for the Florida Region.  All questions on event hotels for Florida Region should first be directed to Team Travel Source.  If additional information is needed beyond what Team Travel can provide, please contact the Florida Region office.
Phone:  502-354-9103
Email: [email protected]

FL REGION BID INFORMATION:
This tournament will award the following bids to the GJNC:
- 13U - 1 National​ Bid
- 14U - 1 National Bid
- 15U - 1 National Bid
- 16U - 1 National Bid
- 17U - 1 National Bid
Note: Open bids received after the event wi…

events.description:
EVENT BEGINS IN:

EVENT SPONSOR:

VENUE POLICIES:
Parking For all events, WRSC will charge $10 per vehicle for parking . Parking payment will be required during events, and all vehicles must follow posted parking rules and designated parking areas. WRSC will be enforcing parking policies to help keep the campus safe, organized, and accessible. Vehicles that do not pay for parking, park illegally, block drive lanes, park in fire lanes, park on grass or sidewalks, or park in unauthorized areas may be subject to enforcement action, including towing at the owner’s expense. Food and Beverage Meals, snacks, and drinks will be available through WRSC Food & Beverage, giving teams, families, spectators, officials, and staff convenient options while on campus. As part of this effort, outside food and drinks will not be permitted during events , unless approved in advance by WRSC.
